name: caddy
note: Apache-2.0. Caddy 2.11.3 with mholt/caddy-l4 used as the public front door: :80 handles HTTP-01 challenges + http→https redirect, and :443 is the layer4 SNI splitter (PANEL_DOMAIN to the inner panel HTTPS listener, all other SNI to ct-singbox:443). The verify probe issues HEAD http://caddy:80/ from the panel container; Caddy's :80 site redirects every request 308 → https, so a 308 response code confirms the listener is alive.
